item.title: The Best Moments So Far at the Winter Olympics
item.description: Three writers and an Olympic medalist on the grit and grace of the winter games.

item.title: Europe Worries About Another Trump Blowup, This One on Tech
item.description: Even as trade tensions between the United States and the European Union seem to calm, officials are concerned that a showdown is brewing over the bloc...

item.title: In Devastated Gaza, Grandiose Peace Plans Clash With Reality
item.description: Israeli strikes on Gaza have killed about 600 people since a cease-fire began, according to health officials in the territory. Many displaced Palestin...

item.title: How Trump Is Making Sure His Ballroom Plans Sail Through
item.description: President Trump has installed allies — including his former receptionist — on the boards and commissions tasked with overseeing the project.

item.title: Uber Moves to Enact Stricter Background Checks for Drivers
item.description: The New York Times revealed in December that the ride-hailing giant approved drivers with many types of criminal convictions, including violent feloni...
